No Poverty.reason: No explicit or inferred evidence in the course syllabus links to poverty eradication or related targets.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course explicitly studies texts on 'daily healing and protection' and 'spiritual cultivation and inner alchemy,' directly linking to promoting mental health and well-being (Target 3.4).

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3). Its focus on systematic textual analysis and research skills cultivates deep understanding and appreciation of cultural heritage, aligning with Target 4.7.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course's focus on systematically studying and reviewing historical Daoist texts directly contributes to the protection and safeguarding of cultural heritage (Target 11.4).
